intro: Ida dyeriana, also known as New Guinea yam or Ida yam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Colocasiaceae. It is valued for its edible tubers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
